name: Fruit Coctail Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and sugar in a bowl and mix well.
2. Add flour, baking soda, and salt; stir until smooth.
3. Stir in the fruit cocktail and almond extract.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 11 x 7-inch (9 x 9-inch) pan.
5. Sprinkle brown sugar and chopped pecans evenly over the top.
6. Bake at 250° for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until set.
7. Serve hot or cold with whipped cream.
Serves 8 to 10
